hasAttributes.name: teamId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for the team.

hasAttributes.name: organizationId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the organization associated with the team.

hasAttributes.name: businessUnitId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the business unit with which the team is associated.

hasAttributes.name: name
hasAttributes.description: Name of the team.

hasAttributes.name: description
hasAttributes.description: Description of the team.

hasAttributes.name: emailAddress
hasAttributes.description: Email address for the team.

hasAttributes.name: createdOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the team was created.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the team was last modified.

hasAttributes.name: createdBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who created the team.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who last modified the team.

hasAttributes.name: versionNumber
hasAttributes.description: Version number of the team.

hasAttributes.name: importSequenceNumber
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the data import or data migration that created this record.

hasAttributes.name: overriddenCreatedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time that the record was migrated.

hasAttributes.name: administratorId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user primary responsible for the team.

hasAttributes.name: isDefault
hasAttributes.description: Information about whether the team is a default business unit team.

hasAttributes.name: yomiName
hasAttributes.description: Pronunciation of the full name of the team, written in phonetic hiragana or katakana characters.

hasAttributes.name: createdOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the delegate user who created the team.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the delegate user who last modified the team.

hasAttributes.name: traversedPath
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: queueId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the default queue for the team.

hasAttributes.name: transactionCurrencyId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the currency associated with the team.

hasAttributes.name: exchangeRate
hasAttributes.description: Exchange rate for the currency associated with the team with respect to the base currency.

hasAttributes.name: teamType
hasAttributes.description: Select the team type.

hasAttributes.name: teamTemplateId
hasAttributes.description: Shows the team template that is associated with the team.

hasAttributes.name: regardingObjectId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the record that the team relates to.

hasAttributes.name: systemManaged
hasAttributes.description: Select whether the team will be managed by the system.

hasAttributes.name: stageId
hasAttributes.description: Shows the ID of the stage.

hasAttributes.name: processId
hasAttributes.description: Shows the ID of the process.

definitions.description: Collection of system users that routinely collaborate. Teams can be used to simplify record sharing and provide team members with common access to organization data when team members belong to different Business Units.
